---
layout: post
title: "Parcial III"
main-class: 'presentaciones'
permalink: /EstadisticaII/EstII:title.html
tags:

introduction: Parcial III

header-includes:
   - \usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsthm,amsfonts}
   - \usepackage[sectionbib]{natbib}
   - \usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}
output:
  md_document:
    variant: markdown_strict+backtick_code_blocks+autolink_bare_uris+ascii_identifiers+tex_math_single_backslash
    preserve_yaml: TRUE
always_allow_html: yes   
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
  rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
  output_dir = "../../EstadisticaII/_posts/", output_format = "all"  ) })
bibliography: "../../referencias.bib"
csl: "../../apa.csl"
---

```{r knitr_init, echo=FALSE, cache=FALSE}
library(knitr)
## Global options
opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE,
               cache=TRUE,
               prompt=FALSE,
               tidy=TRUE,
               comment=NA,
               message=FALSE,
               warning=FALSE,
               fig.path = paste0("../../EstadisticaII/images/", "ParcialIII"),
               cache.path = "../../EstadisticaII/cache/",
               cache = FALSE)
```
# Parcial III
El parcial pueden solucionarlo a mano, y enviar al final de la clase al correo jivan.perez@udea.edu.co, el desarrollo de los puntos y los códigos generados para tal objetivo. D:<

Quedo atento a cualquier duda o inquietud que les surja durante el parcial. No duden en preguntar, pero no pretendan que les haga o revise el punto >:|

# Nota
**Lea atentamente el parcial**. Recuerden interpretar todos los resultados en el contexto del enunciado!!!, **no hacerlo les va hacer perder punto!!!!** >:c

# Bases y enunciados
## Bedoya Vargas Julian Alirio
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1039474881.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1039474881.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Blanco Yarce Juan David
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1044500706.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1044500706.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Cardona Tabares Yeison
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1040051828.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1040051828.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Duque Orrego Valentina
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1044100047.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1044100047.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Garcia Escobar Cristian Andres
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1038823759.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1038823759.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Gonzalez Munevar Laura Sofia
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1052838196.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1052838196.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Jimenez Ramirez Luis Fernando
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1003066798.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1003066798.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Marin Jaramillo John Arturo
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1017129376.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1017129376.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Montoya Pabon Valentina
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1020222282.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1020222282.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Ospina Agudelo Juliana
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1007346941.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1007346941.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Portilla Benavides Karen Vanessa
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1086774044.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1086774044.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Quirama Pino David Camilo
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1214744036.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1214744036.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Ramirez Herrera Jhonatan Alexander
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1040042534.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1040042534.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Rivillas Ochoa Paula Andrea
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1001416490.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1001416490.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Rodriguez Herrera Isabella
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1025642615.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1025642615.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Sandoval Ramirez Joel Alejandro
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1014661670.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1014661670.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Vargas Acevedo Maria Leonor
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1007142409.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1007142409.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Vargas Moreno Oreilys Ayari
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P3296612.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B3296612.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Vasco Agudelo Juan Pablo
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1037662204.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1037662204.csv){:target="_blank"}

## Vásquez López Juan Felipe
* [Enunciado](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/P1128444892.pdf){:target="_blank"}
* [Base de Datos](https://github.com/jiperezga/jiperezga.github.io/raw/master/Dataset/Parcial/B1128444892.csv){:target="_blank"}



<h1> Mucha Suerte! </h1>
